title: POST /orders/waitlist — Request & Response
description: Internal HTTP contract for the Waitlist Service to create a guest order in the Ordering Service. Not exposed to the public frontend.

seatId.description: ID of the seat to reserve in this order.

price.description: Price of the seat in the local currency. Obtained from Catalog at assignment time.

guestToken.description: Email address used as guest identifier. Maps to Order.GuestToken in bc_ordering.

concertEventId.description: ID of the concert event. Stored in the order for reference.

orderId.description: ID of the newly created order. Stored in WaitlistEntry.OrderId.

400.description: Invalid request payload (missing fields, invalid UUID, negative price).

409.description: A non-terminal order already exists for the given seatId. Idempotency guard.

implementation_notes: The handler CreateWaitlistOrderCommand creates the order, adds the seat as an item, and transitions to 'pending' in a single EF Core transaction.
UserId is set to null; GuestToken is set to the email value.
This endpoint is not authenticated (internal call between services in the same Docker network).
